changes.description: Marketplace now has better gem and accessory support.
changes.details: Gem and accessory estimate rows now use bundled icons, clearer names, slot filters, and DPS/Support accessory filters.

changes.description: Accessory estimates are easier to read.
changes.details: Accessory rows now show compact colored stat values by roll grade, with support-specific values for Brand Power, Identity Gain, Ally Attack Power, Ally Damage, and Weapon Power estimates.

changes.description: Dashboard and To Do details are clearer.
changes.details: Dashboard label popups and To Do raid tooltips better explain available characters, additional non-gold raids, and planned versus cleared raid difficulties.
Engraving rows now show only the engraving name, and accessory rows no longer repeat long generated necklace, earring, or ring names.

changes.description: Dashboard label popups stay inside the app window.
changes.details: Dashboard label popups are now centered so they no longer glitch or render partly outside the app on narrower window sizes.

changes.description: Mixed raid difficulty tooltips are clearer.
changes.details: Dashboard and To Do raid tooltips now correctly explain planned versus cleared difficulty when a raid was completed in mixed mode.
